steps.title: At the x-intercept, y equals zero
steps.content: The $x$-intercept is where the graph crosses the $x$-axis. Every point on the $x$-axis has $y=0$, so set the function value equal to $0$.

steps.title: Solve the equation for x
steps.content: Because $g(x)=x-18$, solve $$x-18=0.$$ Add $18$ to both sides to get $$x=18.$$ In Desmos, the line $y=x-18$ crosses the $x$-axis at $(18,0)$.
